programme.desc: Mike's boss, Mr. Phillips, invites him and his family on a fishing trip. When Cindy gets tonsillitis, the trip is postponed. Tonsillitis quickly claims another when Carol also must have her tonsils taken out.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Now that Greg's in high school, he decides that he's too old and mature for his brothers and sisters and the family camping trip, so asks for his own room and a new wardrobe.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: In order to prove that girls can do anything boys can do, Marcia joins Greg's Frontier Scouts group. The boys respond by having Peter join the Sunflower Girls and sell cookies.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Cindy is spooked after seeing a disappearing act at a magic show, and refuses to sleep in the dark. So Peter puts together a magic act of his own with Cindy as his assistant to help her overcome her fears.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby feels like a failure because he is the only Brady child without a trophy. He looks for a way to get one for himself, and a televised ice cream-eating contest could be the answer.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The Bradys fight to save Woodland Park from closing to make way for a new building. Mike's firm gets the project, and he is in charge of the plans, and Mr Phillips delivers the family an ultimatum.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: An old flame comes to town and begins courting Alice. Sam the butcher quickly becomes jealous of the new suitor, and Mike and Carol are also suspicious of his motives.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Carol decides to write a story about the family to submit to a magazine, but her initial story is rejected by the editor because it is not positive and uplifting enough.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg gets a compliment from Dodgers pitcher Don Drysdale. He becomes so obsessed with becoming a pro that it goes to his head. At his next game, Greg bombs so bad that he realises he has a lot to learn.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Mike and Carol agree to let Greg and Marcia babysit their siblings when they're going to be gone for the evening.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The famous tale of Marcia's first house party, which almost doesn't happen after she is accused of drawing an unflattering picture of her teacher in class. Marcia's brothers conspire to ruin the party.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg's American history class project is a home movie about the pilgrims with the rest of the Brady clan as the cast. However, soon the other Bradys take over, and Greg loses control of his project.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia falls in love with nerdy 13-year-old insect collector Harvey Klinger. Things progress so quickly that they decide to start thinking about their future, leading Mike to subtly intervene.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg gets his first job as an office boy at Mike's architectural firm. However, he places his job in jeopardy when he carelessly loses some important designs.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The boys find a wallet with $1100 in a parking lot while playing football. The kids argue about who gets to keep the money and finally agree about sharing it, but the owner comes forward.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: School bully Buddy Hinton makes fun of Cindy for her lisp, and gives Peter a black eye for defending her. When Buddy's parents don't listen to reason, Mike encourages Peter to defend himself and fight back.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan's first crush Clark Tyson is more interested in older girls, especially Marcia. The family plan a surprise party to cheer her up, but Jan creates an imaginary boyfriend George Glass to cheer herself up.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg gets a compliment from Dodgers pitcher Don Drysdale. He becomes so obsessed with becoming a pro that it goes to his head. At his next game, Greg bombs so bad that he realises he has a lot to learn.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Mike and Carol agree to let Greg and Marcia babysit their siblings when they're going to be gone for the evening.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Mike and Carol agree to allow Marcia to have a slumber party and the boys are thrilled because then they'll be able to play tricks on everyone.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Cindy has become somewhat of a tattletale, squealing on her brothers and sisters. So the other siblings soon begin to leave her out of their activities.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby falls while climbing into a treehouse. He hurts his ankle and develops a fear of heights. However, he doesn't want to tell anyone the truth, so he uses his injury as an excuse.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter breaks Carol's favourite vase on the eve of a camping trip that he's looking forward to. So, in order for him to go on the trip, the other Brady siblings unknowingly confess.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan's practical joking puts Greg's science project, a mouse named Myron, in mortal danger when he gets loose, allowing Alice to catch a glimpse of him, which leads to her calling the exterminator.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg gets caught with cigarettes in his school jacket. He's been caught smoking once before and quit immediately. Therefore, nobody believes him when he truthfully says they're not his.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan is tired of living in the shadows of her two sisters. So she buys a curly black wig to stand out and plans to debut 'the New Jan Brady' at Lucy Winters' party.

programme.title: BOSAI

programme.title: Spiritual Designs for Fishermen

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history and culture. This episode looks at words related to sound. Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: The Seasons of Yamato
programme.desc: A series of poetic videos by Koichi Hozan, a videographer living in Nara, in collaboration with a pianist, Mine Kawakami, for which she plays exclusive pieces, makes you experience each seasons.

programme.title: Little Charo

programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini
programme.desc: People in Japan use roughly 150 new cardboard boxes a year. In a 5-minute digest, we examine a broad range of Japan's innovative cardboard products, including waterproof packaging and emergency goods.

programme.desc: In order to prove that girls can do anything boys can do, Marcia joins Greg's Frontier Scouts group. The boys respond by having Peter join the Sunflower Girls and sell cookies.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Cindy is spooked after seeing a disappearing act at a magic show, and refuses to sleep in the dark. So Peter puts together a magic act of his own with Cindy as his assistant to help her overcome her fears.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby feels like a failure because he is the only Brady child without a trophy. He looks for a way to get one for himself, and a televised ice cream-eating contest could be the answer.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The Bradys fight to save Woodland Park from closing to make way for a new building. Mike's firm gets the project, and he is in charge of the plans, and Mr Phillips delivers the family an ultimatum.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: An old flame comes to town and begins courting Alice. Sam the butcher quickly becomes jealous of the new suitor, and Mike and Carol are also suspicious of his motives.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Carol decides to write a story about the family to submit to a magazine, but her initial story is rejected by the editor because it is not positive and uplifting enough.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The Bradys break out of the ghost town jail.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Mike and Peter track down the old prospector, and the Bradys can finally leave the ghost town for the Grand Canyon. However, once they get there, more trouble awaits for Bobby and Cindy.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The Bradys find Bobby and Cindy, who befriend a Native American boy who has run away from home to get away from his grandfather who only believes in the old traditions.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg buys his first car for $100 from his smooth-talking friend Eddie. Finding that he has been stuck with a lemon, Greg attempts to repeat Eddie's snow job when he tries to resell the car to another sucker.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: When Greg learns that Marcia got asked out by a rival at his school, he forbids her from seeing him. As a result, she decides to go out with him more than once, out of spite.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter is down in the dumps after he is told at a party that he has no personality, so he works on creating a new one for himself. Bobby and Cindy encourage the family to do safety drills.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: When Marcia lands the lead role of Juliet in the school play, she lets it get to her head, which leads to her losing the role and having a meltdown when told the bad news.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.sub-title: And Now A Word From Our Sponsor
programme.desc: A commercial producer discovers the Brady family while they are grocery shopping and wants them to be in a laundry soap commercial.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter gets in trouble for eavesdropping on his brothers and sisters with a tape recorder, and his parents force him to apologise. But Greg and Marcia decide that they are going to go one step further.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan is tired of being compared to Marcia and constantly being told how great her older sister is, so she tries to do something that Marcia never accomplished: make the pom-pom team.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg wants to be on the football team, but Carol is against it, fearing that he's going to get hurt. Carol's fears come true when Greg fractures a rib which threatens his first string status.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia makes a promise that she will get Davy Jones to perform at the prom, but finds it almost impossible to reach the former Monkee, until he surprises her with a visit to the Brady house.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.sub-title: The Not So Rose Colored Glasses
programme.desc: Jan's unwillingness to wear the glasses leads to the destruction of Mike's anniversary gift to Carol, a portrait of all children, and the kids must try to reshoot the photo without Mike knowing.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: When Bobby and Cindy are not invited to a wedding because they're too young, they set out to do something important: break a teeter-totter record.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby becomes self-conscious about his height and tries different ways to make himself taller. First, he tries stretching himself, and then, he decides to improve his mind by memorising a bunch of worthless facts.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg writes a song for his brothers and sisters, and reserves a recording studio for The Brady Six. However, before they can record, Peter's voice begins to change and starts cracking uncontrollably.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan discovers that Aunt Jenny had closely resembled her as a teen. Jan writes to Jenny and receives a photo in return, leading her to worry that she will grow up to look just like her strange looking aunt.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby and Greg make a bet on how many chin-ups each can do. Confident Greg relaxes while Bobby practices, and when the two finally compete, Bobby ends up on top, with Greg doomed to be his servant.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter "Scoop" Brady gets a job for the school paper and discovers writing nice things about classmates has fringe benefits. So, when he makes a "D" on his final exam, he tries the same tactic on his teacher.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Alice has decided to take a well deserved vacation, but feeling like she's deserting the Brady family, she calls in her cousin, Emma.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Cindy is jealous of her older sisters and doesn't want to be treated like a kid any more. Bobby tries to her cheer up by pretending to be a secret admirer.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia's class nominates ugly duckling Molly Webber for Senior Banquet Night host as a joke. Marcia decides to give her a makeover, but what will Marcia do when she discovers that she's Molly's competition?

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Carol is in a car accident with a man who agrees to pay for his own damages. However, he changes his mind and Carol finds herself summoned to court with Bobby and Cindy testifying against her.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The Bradys break out of the ghost town jail.

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: This program is an animation series about a Japanese dog, Charo. He meets and is helped by many mythical creatures of Northern Japan as he searches for eight star talismans. Tohoku series 1-2.

programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini
programme.desc: People in Japan use roughly 150 new cardboard boxes a year. In a 5-minute digest, we examine a broad range of Japan's innovative cardboard products, including waterproof packaging and emergency goods.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: A scallop fisherman's cat, Miya, keeps watch while her owner is at sea. Once he's back, Miya's ready to cuddle. Meanwhile, a cat in Hachinohe City sits on her owner's newspaper to get his attention.

programme.title: Core Kyoto Mini

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Artisan Matoba Kensho restores traditional dolls. Beyond cleaning, he repairs damage to faces. Well-cared-for dolls can last 100 years, so he hopes people bring them to him, and never discard them.

programme.desc: Roger visits a barbecue institution serving chopped pork in South Carolina and a restaurant serving Hill County barbecue classics in Texas.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: When Bobby and Cindy are not invited to a wedding because they're too young, they set out to do something important: break a teeter-totter record.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby becomes self-conscious about his height and tries different ways to make himself taller. First, he tries stretching himself, and then, he decides to improve his mind by memorising a bunch of worthless facts.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg writes a song for his brothers and sisters, and reserves a recording studio for The Brady Six. However, before they can record, Peter's voice begins to change and starts cracking uncontrollably.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan discovers that Aunt Jenny had closely resembled her as a teen. Jan writes to Jenny and receives a photo in return, leading her to worry that she will grow up to look just like her strange looking aunt.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby and Greg make a bet on how many chin-ups each can do. Confident Greg relaxes while Bobby practices, and when the two finally compete, Bobby ends up on top, with Greg doomed to be his servant.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter "Scoop" Brady gets a job for the school paper and discovers writing nice things about classmates has fringe benefits. So, when he makes a "D" on his final exam, he tries the same tactic on his teacher.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Alice has decided to take a well deserved vacation, but feeling like she's deserting the Brady family, she calls in her cousin, Emma.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Cindy is jealous of her older sisters and doesn't want to be treated like a kid any more. Bobby tries to her cheer up by pretending to be a secret admirer.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia's class nominates ugly duckling Molly Webber for Senior Banquet Night host as a joke. Marcia decides to give her a makeover, but what will Marcia do when she discovers that she's Molly's competition?

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Carol is in a car accident with a man who agrees to pay for his own damages. However, he changes his mind and Carol finds herself summoned to court with Bobby and Cindy testifying against her.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Mike has to check on the construction of a building that his construction firm is building, and as it so happens the building is in Hawaii, so he takes the whole family along.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: During a surfing competition, Greg wears Bobby's taboo idol and wipes out. Soon after, Greg, Peter and Bobby learn of the ancient superstition from a construction worker, Mr Hanalei.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: An archaeologist traps the boys in the caves at the burial ground and takes them hostage, insisting they tell him where they found the idol.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: It's the beginning of another school year and Marcia panics about becoming a freshman in school, going as far as pretending to be sick.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter has a crush on Jan's new friend, but every plan to impress her backfires. Inspired by the play Cyrano de Bergerac, he launches a plan to win her over, but it also backfires when she falls for Greg instead.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The boys try to spook the girls in the middle of the night with a ghost, so they try to exact revenge by giving them a taste of their own medicine.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg and Marcia recruit their parents to participate in Family Frolics Night at school. Alice is upset with Sam when he passes a chance to be her date to the event to go to bowling practice.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan feels disrespected and ignored by her siblings, so she tells everyone that she wishes she was an only child. Meanwhile, Carol and Alice have a competition over who can cook the best strawberry preserves.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Mike thinks Greg wants to be an architect after reading Greg's school essay, but Greg doesn't want to hurt Mike's feelings and tell him the truth. The other Brady kids also begin thinking about their future careers.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The kids give Alice the cold shoulder after they think she has broken their trust, so feeling unwanted and no longer needed, Alice quits. However, the kids soon regret their decision.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg is crazy for his latest girlfriend, Jennifer, but things get difficult for him when he learns that both Jennifer and Marcia are competing for head cheerleader, and he just happens to be one of the judges.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter gets the role of Benedict Arnold instead. But he then wants to quit the play altogether when his classmates start branding him as a "traitor."

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia has a crush on her new dentist, which only intensifies when she mistakes an opportunity to babysit for him as a date with him to the ballet.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby is crestfallen when he is picked to be safety monitor at school.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby mentions to Mike and Carol that Greg was in a near car accident on the freeway due to the fact that he was reading the cover jacket of a new record.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The kids want to buy Mike and Carol an engraved silver tray as their anniversary gift, but Jan goofs up on paying for the tray. To fix the mistake, Jan convinces her siblings to audition for an amateur talent show.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The principal calls home to alert Mike and Carol to the fact that Bobby's playing Jesse James at school.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: When Marcia breaks her date with Charlie to go out with Doug, the "big man on campus", her brothers accidentally hit her face with a football.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter is elated over getting his first job in Mr Martinelli's bike shop, repairing bicycles.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter's new detective kit comes in handy when Cindy takes, and then loses, a pair of antique earrings Marcia had borrowed from Carol, that she was warned not to touch.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The kids try to set up their maternal great-grandmother, Grandma Connie Hutchins, and paternal great-grandfather, Grandpa Hank Brady, after the two come for a visit.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Cindy studies hard and passes a test to appear on a TV quiz show, but an overconfident Bobby does not. After she passes, Cindy is chosen, her ego alienates the rest of the Brady kids.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: When the family cleans out the attic, both Greg and Marcia realise what a great room it would be and they both begin fighting over who gets it. This leads to yet another battle between the sexes.

programme.desc: Cindy studies hard and passes a test to appear on a TV quiz show, but an overconfident Bobby does not. After she passes, Cindy is chosen, her ego alienates the rest of the Brady kids.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: When the family cleans out the attic, both Greg and Marcia realise what a great room it would be and they both begin fighting over who gets it. This leads to yet another battle between the sexes.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: A talent agent signs Greg to become a rock star named "Johnny Bravo." Greg lets his new fame get to his head, until he discovers that he was only signed because he "fit the suit."

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby lies to his friends by telling them he knows NFL legend Joe Namath. So Cindy sends a bogus letter to Namath stating that Bobby is dying and that his last wish is to meet the football star.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.sub-title: Snow White And The Seven Bradys
programme.desc: To get enough money for a retirement gift for a teacher, the Brady family puts on a production of Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: After Bobby defends a girl at school, she rewards him with a kiss and he immediately sees fireworks. But after a second kiss, she tells Bobby that she may have the mumps.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg gets Peter to pretend to be an older guy and go with him on a double date, and Mike and Carol prepare to entertain one of Mike's clients from Mexico.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: When a rival high school steals the mascot from Greg's school, Greg gets involved in stealing the rival schools goat to get even and hides it in his room.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia, Jan and Peter each get jobs at the local ice cream parlour, Marcia loves her new job until the shiftless Peter fouls things up and Jan outperforms her.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby saves Peter from potential serious injury after he pushes him out of the way of a falling ladder. A grateful Peter offers to become Bobby's "slave for life", something that Bobby takes advantage of.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The rival school's quarterback suddenly takes an interest in Marcia the week of the football game., and Mike is Jealous when Carol's high school sweetheart comes for a visit.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: After a string of failures, and not being choose for the ballet recital Jan thinks she has no talent, until she discovers tap dancing, which drives the Brady family crazy.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Mike takes the entire family on a trip to the King's Island amusement park, where he is to submit plans to a client, but a mix-up causes the blueprints to go missing at the park.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: A series of misunderstandings lead the Bradys to believe that Alice and Sam are up to much more than just bowling on their upcoming Saturday night date.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan makes a bunch of promises to be elected the Most Popular Girl in her class, but backs out of them after she wins the election. Mike and Carol try to make plans for their second honeymoon.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: A couple Mike and Carol know adopt three ethnically diverse boys and dealing with an inhospitable neighbour.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg bets Marcia that she can't beat his score on her driver's test. However, all the pressure gets the best of Marcia.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter and Bobby believe they are seeing a UFO, which actually is part of an elaborate hoax being played by Greg. The trick backfires though when they take pictures, which lead to a government investigation.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: When Carol tells Mike she's expecting an addition to the family, Cindy and Bobby think Carol is pregnant and tell the family. But the new addition is Carol's nephew, who seems to bring trouble wherever he goes.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter meets a schoolmate who looks and sounds exactly like him. When Peter finds he has two dates for the same night, he hatches a plan to use his doppelganger to stand in for him.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: When an FBI agent makes a visit to check Mike's security clearance, Bobby and Oliver both become convinced that Mike is working on some plans for a top secret project.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia plants a bogus story in her diary to trap the snooping Cindy, which leads Cindy to believe a talent scout wants her to be the next Shirley Temple.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: When Mike's boss, Mr. Matthews, sends the family a pool table, Bobby becomes obsessed with pool, challenging all comers including Mr. Matthews himself.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch

programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Golden Cobra
programme.desc: The Indian Commissioner of the Pawnee Indians recruits James West to investigate the strange occurrences at the reservation.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon are engaged to rescue an American Indian chief's abducted daughter before the tribe retaliates.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Big Blast
programme.desc: Dr Faustina and her mute servant, Miklos, have transformed a corpse into a duplicate image of Jim West.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Flying Pie Plate
programme.desc: Agent James West is protecting a shipment of gold en route to an Arizona town when he sees a flaming light in the sky and hears a loud crash.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Poisonous Posey
programme.desc: While on vacation, West and Gordon wander into the town of Justice, Nevada. After an unexpectedly exciting greeting by the citizens, they start to notice an unusual number of criminals.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Bottomless Pit
programme.desc: The assignment for James West is to find a fellow agent who is imprisoned on Devil's Island. Getting imprisoned himself, West is given lashes and sent into a pit where he finds Vincent Reed.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Watery Death
programme.desc: While at the Mermaid Bar, Agent James West is shot with a blow dart by a woman disguised as a mermaid.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: God calls us to be holy-not a suggestion, but a command. Pastor Bayless explains holiness begins in the heart and moves outward.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham over 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life. He will leave you knowing where you want to go and what to do next.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Own Your New Creation Identity Pt 4 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers how greatly blessed they are.

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.desc: Plenty of fun, laughs, adventures and silly songs with Bob the Tomato, Larry the Cucumber and all the Veggie Tales gang. Join them as they share stories from the Bible and learn about God who loves them.

programme.title: Deditos
programme.sub-title: God And His People In The Wilderness
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Set Free to Follow God Pt24
programme.desc: God's rescue of His people from slavery is a model for every act of salvation. His interest is not merely in rescuing people, but to bring them into a life-giving relationship to renew the whole world.

programme.title: Holy Rollin'
programme.desc: Get a feel for the rugged sunburnt countryside and the people of the outback as Nick and Yvette Wynne, the motorcycle missionaries, traverse 20 000 km in 3 months riding around Australia.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: None of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Join Jeni and her friends as they travel to northern Michigan in the middle of winter. The focus of this series is to learn more about God's character through great women of the bible.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.sub-title: Joan of Arc - The Original Influencer
programme.desc: Influence. Everyone wants it; everyone has it; but only few can wield it on the level that Joan of Arc did. Learn how she went from a nobody from nowhere to becoming the original influencer.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Sister Religions?
programme.desc: A new resource, featuring interviews with Bishop Michael Nazir-Ali, Rev Dr Mark Durie and Elizabeth Kendal, explores the relationship between Christianity, Judaism and Islam.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Finding God's Will for Your Life - Part 1

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Tourists start arriving, including the St. Johns, who may prove to be trouble for Bill. Meanwhile, Elizabeth rallies all Rosemary's friends to plan the perfect baby shower.

programme.title: Home is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Actor and craftsman Luke Macfarlane alongside designer Oliva Westbrooks bring heart, home, and hope to life-changing renovations - proving that sometimes, the greatest transformations begin from within.

programme.title: Three Chairs
programme.desc: A talk show with a difference that celebrates the art of good conversation. Hosts grapple with topics including dating, phone addiction, parenting, and gender equality.

programme.title: Dot Conner: Webtective

programme.title: Little Worship Company

programme.title: Superbook

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: View & Chew

programme.title: A Thousand Tomorrows

programme.title: Living The Dream

programme.title: Vindication

programme.title: Planetshakers TV
